data.title: VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Declares 7.25 Cent Dividend
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited AccumUSD ( (GB:VOF) ) has shared an update.

VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited has declared a dividend of 7.25 US cents per share, with the payment scheduled for on or around 6 May 2026, and a record date of 20 March 2026, while the shares will trade ex-dividend from 19 March 2026. The company will pay the dividend in pounds sterling to shareholders registered in the UK or Channel Islands and in US dollars elsewhere, with investors able to elect an alternative currency by 15 April 2026, and the applicable sterling exchange rate to be confirmed around 20 April 2026, underscoring the fund’s ongoing capital return to investors and its adherence to UK market disclosure rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:VOF) stock is a Hold with a £485.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited AccumUSD stock, see the GB:VOF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:VOF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:VOF is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by the company’s low-leverage balance sheet and strong cash generation, which reduce financial risk. This is tempered by highly volatile profitability (recent swing to losses), mixed technical momentum, and a negative P/E that limits valuation support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:VOF stock, click here.

More about VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited AccumUSD

VinaCapital Vietnam Opportunity Fund Limited is a closed-ended investment company incorporated in Guernsey and authorised as a registered collective investment scheme. Managed by VinaCapital Investment Management, the fund provides investors with exposure to Vietnamese assets, targeting long-term capital growth from opportunities across Vietnam’s economy.

data.title: Unilever Files 2025 Annual Report and Delays New Board Appointment to 2027
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Unilever ( (GB:ULVR) ).

Unilever has published its 2025 Annual Report and Accounts and its 2025 Form 20-F, making the documents available on its website and through key regulatory channels in the UK, the Netherlands and the U.S. The filings, covering the year ended 31 December 2025, reinforce the group’s compliance with multi-jurisdictional reporting standards and provide investors with detailed insight into its financial performance, risks and governance.

The company also updated the market on governance changes, confirming that the appointment of Belén Garijo López as an independent non-executive director to the Unilever board, first announced in October 2025, is now expected to take effect during 2027. This delay in a planned board addition may draw attention from governance-focused investors, though Unilever’s reiteration of its risk disclosures and regulatory transparency underlines its efforts to maintain confidence among stakeholders across its major listing venues.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ULVR) stock is a Sell with a £4300.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Unilever stock, see the GB:ULVR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:ULVR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:ULVR is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by steady profitability and reliable free cash flow, tempered by higher leverage. Technicals are supportive (price above key averages, positive MACD) but appear overextended on RSI/Stoch. Valuation is somewhat demanding at ~22.7x earnings, while the ~3.44% dividend yield and earnings-call outlook (cautious growth guidance plus buyback and cash generation) provide support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:ULVR stock, click here.

More about Unilever

Unilever PLC is a global consumer goods company focused on food, beauty and personal care, and home care products, with listings in London, Amsterdam and the U.S. Its diversified brand portfolio and broad geographic footprint position it as a bellwether for trends in everyday consumer staples and sustainability-focused product innovation.

data.title: Xcite Uranium to Issue Shares to Expand Athabasca Basin Project Interests
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Xcite Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:XRI) ) is now available.

Xcite Uranium Inc. will issue 900,000 common shares to Eagle Plains Resources Ltd. under six option agreements that allow Xcite to earn up to an 80% interest in six uranium projects totaling 5,905 hectares near Uranium City in northern Saskatchewan. The shares, which relate to the Gulch, Lorado, Smitty, Don Lake, Beaver River and Black Bay properties, will be subject to a four-month hold period under Canadian securities laws.

The transaction deepens Xcite’s strategic foothold in the Athabasca Basin, reinforcing its focus on reviving a past-producing uranium district through modern exploration techniques and geological modelling. Consolidating interests in this cluster of projects positions the company to scale its exploration activities in a historically significant uranium camp, potentially enhancing its leverage to any future upturn in uranium demand tied to the energy transition.

More about Xcite Resources, Inc.

Xcite Uranium Inc. is an early-stage mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of energy transition metals, with a particular emphasis on uranium. Its core asset portfolio comprises six properties in the Athabasca Basin near Uranium City, Saskatchewan, a historic high-grade uranium camp that has been largely dormant for four decades, where the company aims to apply new geological modelling to make high-grade discoveries.

Average Trading Volume: 142,947

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$2.36M

See more data about XRI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: 1Spatial Shareholders Back VertiGIS Takeover Ahead of AIM Delisting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

1Spatial ( (GB:SPA) ) has shared an announcement.

Shareholders of 1Spatial have voted overwhelmingly in favour of the recommended cash takeover by VertiGIS, approving the court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement and related resolutions at both a Court Meeting and General Meeting. With more than 99% of votes cast backing the deal, the transaction now moves to the final stages of court approval and regulatory clearances, after which the acquisition is expected to complete in the first half of 2026 and 1Spatial’s shares will be delisted from AIM, marking a significant shift in ownership and likely reducing public-market liquidity for existing investors while integrating the business into VertiGIS’s wider geospatial software portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SPA) stock is a Hold with a £72.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 1Spatial stock, see the GB:SPA Stock Forecast page.

1Spatial’s stock score is primarily influenced by strong financial performance and technical indicators, despite concerns over valuation. The high P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield significantly impact the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:SPA stock, click here.

More about 1Spatial

1Spatial Plc is a UK-listed provider of geospatial data management and location-based software solutions, serving public and private sector clients that rely on accurate spatial data for planning, infrastructure and regulatory needs. The company’s shares are admitted to trading on AIM, giving it access to growth capital from small-cap and technology-focused investors in London’s junior market.

Fuller Smith & Turner ( (GB:FSTA) ) just unveiled an update.

Fuller, Smith & Turner has continued its previously announced share buyback programme by repurchasing 15,000 “A” Ordinary Shares on 12 March 2026 through Deutsche Numis at prices between 679p and 683p, with an average price of 681p per share. The company plans to hold these shares in treasury, a move that fine-tunes its capital structure and can enhance earnings per share and shareholder value over time.

Following this transaction, Fuller’s listed issued share capital stands at 36,446,686 “A” Ordinary Shares, of which 4,770,022 are held in treasury, leaving 31,676,664 voting shares in circulation. The updated voting-rights denominator is relevant for investors monitoring their disclosure thresholds under U.K. transparency rules and signals ongoing active capital management by the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FSTA) stock is a Buy with a £847.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fuller Smith & Turner stock, see the GB:FSTA Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Petrobras Highlights R$277.6 Billion Tax and Royalty Contribution in Brazil for 2025
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ) has issued an announcement.

Petrobras reported that in 2025 it paid R$277.6 billion in taxes and government take in Brazil, a 3% increase over the prior year, alongside US$448.65 million in taxes abroad and the approval of R$47.5 billion in dividends, of which R$45.2 billion were disbursed. The company said these payments, equivalent to about R$1.1 billion per business day and roughly 7% of Brazil’s total revenue, underscore its status as one of the country’s largest taxpayers and a key source of funding for federal, state and municipal budgets, reinforcing its economic and social relevance as it pursues its strategy as an integrated, diversified energy player.

In 2025 Petrobras’ contributions included R$68.6 billion in royalties and other government take, R$93.3 billion in federal taxes and R$113.8 billion in state taxes, reflecting its heavy exposure to Brazil’s complex multi-level tax system and its role as both taxpayer and tax withholding agent. Management highlighted that robust tax governance, supported by ethics and transparency principles, is central to the company’s risk management and to its ability to sustain large-scale public transfers and shareholder returns, positioning Petrobras as a pivotal intermediary between the oil sector’s wealth generation and public spending in areas such as health, education, infrastructure and security.

The most recent analyst rating on (PBR) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras stock, see the PBR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PBR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PBR is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong margins and cash generation, though cyclical and less robust than peak years) and strong technical trend signals despite overbought momentum risk. Valuation is a major positive with a very low P/E and high dividend yield, while the earnings call supports the outlook via operational execution but flags key risks from oil-price exposure (no hedging) and elevated debt/leasing obligations.

To see Spark’s full report on PBR stock, click here.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras is Brazil’s state-controlled integrated energy company, operating across exploration and production, refining, distribution and related petroleum and gas activities. With 477 branches in 22 states and 128 municipalities, it is among the main taxpayers in Brazil, playing a central role in the national oil, gas and fuel markets and in public revenue generation.

Average Trading Volume: 25,444,839

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $116.8B

See more insights into PBR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
